verdicts.note: Direction is defensible (Therapeutic Alternative Unit, behavioral-health subcommittee chair, SB 5066), but 'high' ignores substantial enforcement-side signals in the same dossier: 20 years as prosecutor, WACOPS Legislator of the Year, and pamphlet emphasis on victim services and accountability [S1][S3]. The record points both ways; +1 medium, not high.
